# thoth_policy_exception (Data Source)

Reads a single policy exception request by request ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thoth_policy_exception" "crm_export" {
  request_id = thoth_policy_exception.crm_export.request_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `request_id` (String) Policy exception request ID.

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Full policy exception object as JSON.
- `requested_by` (String) User who requested the exception.
- `reviewed_by` (String) Reviewer identity when available.
- `status` (String) Current exception request status.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
